overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit urban plaza at night. The scene features wet reflective pavement, holographic advertisements, and pedestrians in a futuristic cyberpunk city with towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with benches and digital kiosks

events.description: camera circles around stationary woman holding a weapon, then continues forward

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling around a woman standing on the sidewalk, observing her weapon

notable_agents.action: woman standing still holding a large melee weapon, looking around casually

dark metal bench with wooden slats

tall skyscraper with illuminated orange Kang Tao corporate signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet neon-lit plaza at night. The camera approaches a woman standing with a large weapon, circles around her, then continues forward. Park benches and digital advertisement kiosks line the walkway, while the Kang Tao building looms in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian plaza with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza passing various pedestrians and observing the neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the same direction ahead

entered.detail: large animated holographic advertisement of a blue bioluminescent jellyfish-like creature on building facade
bright red neon corporate sign for Petrochem

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a moderately crowded plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers. The blue holographic jellyfish advertisement dominates the left side of the view, while the Petrochem sign glows red on the right. Pedestrians walk in scattered directions across the wet reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza dominated by giant holographic fish advertisement

events.description: large red holographic fish appears on the left, becoming the dominant visual element

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza toward the large red holographic display, passing pedestrians

entered.detail: massive orange-red holographic projection of a koi fish swimming in mid-air, casting red light on the plaza

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses, a massive red holographic fish materializes on the left, swimming through the air above the plaza. The creature's orange-red glow illuminates the wet pavement below. The camera continues walking past this impressive holographic display while other pedestrians move through the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban plaza that evolves from a focused encounter into a wide display of towering holographic spectacles. It begins by approaching and circling a woman armed with a large weapon, moving past park benches and digital kiosks toward the distant Kang Tao building. As the camera pushes further into the crowded plaza, the environment opens up to reveal towering skyscrapers flanked by a blue holographic jellyfish on the left and a glowing red Petrochem sign on the right. The scene then shifts as a massive red holographic fish materializes and swims through the air, casting an orange-red glow across the wet reflective pavement. The camera finally continues its forward progression, gliding past the luminous creature and through the flow of pedestrians under the city's vibrant lights.
